About Me

Hi, I'm Menna Ammar

UI/UX Designer focused on creating simple, user-centered digital experiences. I combine usability with strong visual design and branding to build products that are both functional and visually engaging.

Education

ITI Intensive Course, UI/UX Design
Faculty of Applied Arts, Product Design Department

Tools
Ps
Ai
Mz

Services

I provide UI/UX design services for websites and mobile applications, focusing on creating intuitive and user-friendly digital experiences. I also offer branding and visual design services, including logo design, brand identity, and social media visuals to help brands communicate with a clear and consistent visual style.

UI/UX Design

End-to-end mobile and web app design, including user research, wireframes, prototypes, and polished high-fidelity interfaces focused on intuitive, user-centered experiences.

Branding Design

Logo design, brand identity systems, and visual design that help brands communicate with a clear, consistent, and memorable visual style across all touchpoints.
